news.title:
India's IPO fund mobilisation rose 20% YoY to Rs 1.78L Cr in FY26 despite equity market volatility.
Post-listing, 224 of 396 IPOs trade below issue prices; major IPOs like LIC, One97 underperform.
news.summary:
India's IPO fund mobilisation rose 20% YoY to Rs 1.78L Cr in FY26 despite equity market volatility.
Post-listing, 224 of 396 IPOs trade below issue prices; major IPOs like LIC, One97 underperform.

news.title:
One 97 Communications reports loan waiver by AGTech of ₹142 Cr for subsidiary FGTPL.
FGTPL discontinued real money gaming; no adverse financial impact on One 97 Communications.
news.summary:
One 97 Communications reports loan waiver by AGTech of ₹142 Cr for subsidiary FGTPL.
FGTPL discontinued real money gaming; no adverse financial impact on One 97 Communications.

news.title:
Paytm, HUDCO, Bharti Hexacom, MRPL, and UPL led midcap losses at market close.
LIC Housing rose 2% after HSBC upgraded its rating from hold to buy.
news.summary:
Paytm, HUDCO, Bharti Hexacom, MRPL, and UPL led midcap losses at market close.
LIC Housing rose 2% after HSBC upgraded its rating from hold to buy.

news.title:
Mid, smallcap indices plunged; Nifty Midcap 100 fell 3.5% and Nifty Smallcap 100 dropped 3.8%.
Stocks like Muthoot Finance, Voltas, SAIL, Paytm, and Firstcry declined over 5% amid global geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Mid, smallcap indices plunged; Nifty Midcap 100 fell 3.5% and Nifty Smallcap 100 dropped 3.8%.
Stocks like Muthoot Finance, Voltas, SAIL, Paytm, and Firstcry declined over 5% amid global geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
Jefferies sees Paytm targeting 20%+ revenue growth, better EBITDA margins via operating leverage.
Buy rating on Paytm with revised target price of ₹1,350; Pine Labs at ₹260.
news.summary:
Jefferies sees Paytm targeting 20%+ revenue growth, better EBITDA margins via operating leverage.
Buy rating on Paytm with revised target price of ₹1,350; Pine Labs at ₹260.

news.title:
One 97 Communications surged 5.3% intraday on Mar 18 to Rs 1,072.
The stock outperformed its sector by 3.9% amid a positive market environment.
news.summary:
One 97 Communications surged 5.3% intraday on Mar 18 to Rs 1,072.
The stock outperformed its sector by 3.9% amid a positive market environment.

news.title:
Paytm confirms NPCI's revised RuPay Credit Card UPI fees have no impact on merchant revenue or MDR.
Paytm shares fell 1% today; stock declined 11% in a month, 16% in six months.
news.summary:
Paytm confirms NPCI's revised RuPay Credit Card UPI fees have no impact on merchant revenue or MDR.
Paytm shares fell 1% today; stock declined 11% in a month, 16% in six months.

news.title:
Paytm reduces RuPay credit card UPI fees; non-industry down to 6 bps, industry to 3 bps.
Fee reductions aim to enhance consumer payment affordability on UPI platform.
news.summary:
Paytm reduces RuPay credit card UPI fees; non-industry down to 6 bps, industry to 3 bps.
Fee reductions aim to enhance consumer payment affordability on UPI platform.

news.title:
NPCI revises TPAP and Payer PSP fees for RuPay Credit Card on UPI from April 1, 2026.
Paytm states no material impact on merchant acquiring revenue; leads in merchant payments.
news.summary:
NPCI revises TPAP and Payer PSP fees for RuPay Credit Card on UPI from April 1, 2026.
Paytm states no material impact on merchant acquiring revenue; leads in merchant payments.

news.title:
Paytm leads soundbox installations with 60% EBITDA margin, earning ₹900 Cr revenue from merchant lending in H1 FY26.
Paytm aims to elevate Paytm Money into a top-five wealth management platform within 3 years.
news.summary:
Paytm leads soundbox installations with 60% EBITDA margin, earning ₹900 Cr revenue from merchant lending in H1 FY26.
Paytm aims to elevate Paytm Money into a top-five wealth management platform within 3 years.

news.title:
Macquarie highlights Paytm's rising competition from PhonePe, which boosts its financial services revenue share.
PhonePe's share increase from 4% FY24 to 13% 1HFY26 could pressure Paytm's margins, impacting one-third of its revenue.
news.summary:
Macquarie highlights Paytm's rising competition from PhonePe, which boosts its financial services revenue share.
PhonePe's share increase from 4% FY24 to 13% 1HFY26 could pressure Paytm's margins, impacting one-third of its revenue.

news.title:
Paytm's revenue mix surpasses PhonePe in monetisation depth, showcasing stronger revenue quality.
CNBC TV18 offers premium content like events, expert opinions, and exclusive studio tours for members.
news.summary:
Paytm's revenue mix surpasses PhonePe in monetisation depth, showcasing stronger revenue quality.
CNBC TV18 offers premium content like events, expert opinions, and exclusive studio tours for members.

news.title:
Paytm launched a silver savings feature, allowing investments from ₹20 via its app.
Silver is sourced from MMTC PAMP, stored in insured vaults, with no making charges.
news.summary:
Paytm launched a silver savings feature, allowing investments from ₹20 via its app.
Silver is sourced from MMTC PAMP, stored in insured vaults, with no making charges.

news.title:
Paytm drives monetisation as merchant payments dominate revenues, per Bernstein.
Merchant payments account for nearly 75% of the digital payments industry's net revenue.
news.summary:
Paytm drives monetisation as merchant payments dominate revenues, per Bernstein.
Merchant payments account for nearly 75% of the digital payments industry's net revenue.

news.title:
PhonePe's IPO may seek a $15B valuation with a 10% stake sale raising $1.5B.
Macquarie views this IPO as a significant event for India's fintech sector and Paytm.
news.summary:
PhonePe's IPO may seek a $15B valuation with a 10% stake sale raising $1.5B.
Macquarie views this IPO as a significant event for India's fintech sector and Paytm.

news.title:
One 97 Communications issued 76,862 equity shares at AED 100 to Abbar Global.
Post issuance, Abbar holds 49% of Paytm Arab Payments, now a 51% subsidiary.
news.summary:
One 97 Communications issued 76,862 equity shares at AED 100 to Abbar Global.
Post issuance, Abbar holds 49% of Paytm Arab Payments, now a 51% subsidiary.

news.title: One 97 Communications' Paytm Insurance Broking gets license extended till Feb 2029.
news.summary: One 97 Communications' Paytm Insurance Broking gets license extended till Feb 2029.

news.title:
Paytm and MobiKwik fell up to 4% after RBI's new fraud framework proposal.
The RBI plans to compensate customers up to ₹25,000 for small fraudulent transactions.
news.summary:
Paytm and MobiKwik fell up to 4% after RBI's new fraud framework proposal.
The RBI plans to compensate customers up to ₹25,000 for small fraudulent transactions.

news.title:
One 97 Communications (Paytm) will participate in investor meetings from Feb 10 to Mar 18, 2026.
Meetings include events by Axis Capital, Dolat Capital, Kotak, IIFL, and Jefferies, with no UPSI shared.
news.summary:
One 97 Communications (Paytm) will participate in investor meetings from Feb 10 to Mar 18, 2026.
Meetings include events by Axis Capital, Dolat Capital, Kotak, IIFL, and Jefferies, with no UPSI shared.

news.title:
One 97 Communications shared Q3 earnings call transcript, focusing on payments and financial services.
Discussed PIDF impact, BNPL growth, and plans for wallet and merchant expansion.
news.summary:
One 97 Communications shared Q3 earnings call transcript, focusing on payments and financial services.
Discussed PIDF impact, BNPL growth, and plans for wallet and merchant expansion.
